scene: Teen Byte pausing at his desk to admire the golden 10-day streak trophy on the shelf above, taking a proud celebratory moment after nine productive commits

subjects.description: Teen Byte with gangly limbs, big expressive eyes looking upward toward trophy shelf with proud joy, pixel art blob body with awkward teen proportions
subjects.position: center foreground at desk, body turned slightly toward trophy shelf
subjects.action: hands resting on desk, head tilted up gazing at trophy with satisfied smile, relaxed celebratory posture

subjects.description: anchor environment: wooden desk with oversized silver laptop open and glowing, Chicago skyline visible through window behind
subjects.position: desk center stage, window in background left

style: pixel art, clean 2D forms, dithered shading, readable silhouette, crisp edges
lighting: warm bright afternoon sunlight streaming through window, golden-yellow rays across desk and trophy shelf, laptop screen glow
mood: ecstatic and proud, celebratory satisfaction, teen joy in achievement
background: wooden trophy shelf above desk with golden 10-day trophy on left and small green plant on right, food bowl on floor to the right of desk with moderate kibble level, Chicago skyline buildings in warm afternoon haze
composition: Byte centered at desk turned toward trophy shelf, laptop prominent, trophy shelf clearly visible above with gleaming trophy, window showing skyline left background
